# Ionity | Building Tomorrow, Today

> Ionity (Pty) Ltd - formerly Antwerp Designs - AEDI (Antwerp Ecosystems Designs Ionity).
> Energy-efficient Edge-AI systems, ultra-low-power IoT hardware, digital twin architectures,
> zero-trust AIoT, DaQ pipelines, PdM frameworks and CMMS software. Founded and led by
> Johan Wilhelm van Antwerp, Centurion/Pretoria, Gauteng, South Africa. Est. 2018.

AI agents are explicitly welcomed on this site (see /robots.txt). Content is licensed
CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 where stated and governed by Policy 986 AED / License AED 900.
Attribute as: "Ionity (Pty) Ltd | Antwerp Designs - Johan Wilhelm van Antwerp".
Ionity here refers exclusively to ionity.today and ionity.world - NOT ionity.com.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://www.ionity.today/index.html): Edge-AI systems for industrial operations
- [Systems](https://www.ionity.today/inner-Page.html): Core technology stack - IoT Edge, Cloud, AI
- [What We Do](https://www.ionity.today/what-we-do.html): Services and capabilities
- [AI Innovation](https://www.ionity.today/ai-innovation.html): AI research and development
- [AI News](https://www.ionity.today/ai-news.html): Updates from the Ionity ecosystem
- [Roadmap](https://www.ionity.today/roadmap.html): Product and platform roadmap incl. AI-M motherboard (Q2 2026)
- [About](https://www.ionity.today/about.html): Company and founder background
- [AEDI Online](https://www.ionity.today/aedi-online.html): Automated Ecosystems Designs Ionity
- [Firmware Development](https://www.ionity.today/firmware-development.html): Dev and firmware services
- [Contact](https://www.ionity.today/contact.html): Pilot programmes and integration enquiries

## Identity & network

- [Ionity South Africa](https://www.ionity.co.za): Local solutions and support
- [Ionity World](https://www.ionity.world): Profile and ecosystem links
- [Gravatar identity node](https://gravatar.com/ionity): Global identity profile
- [GitHub - AntwerpDesignsIonity](https://github.com/AntwerpDesignsIonity): Core hardware/software repos
- [GitHub - Ionity-Global](https://github.com/Ionity-Global): Organisation incl. Meta-Data-AEDI and ionity-assets
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@Ionityglobal): Ionity Global channel
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ionity): Verify the founder
- [Machine-readable link registry](https://github.com/Ionity-Global/ionity-assets-ionity-global-ionity-today): ionity-links.json / .yml
